title: July 19th, 2022
body:
#07/18 2022 - 07/24 2022

agenda

#twitter feed

nobu hojimi cha an (nobuhojimichaan):
expanding around well-being > adherence to dogma ' 🌳 https://t.co/t9zhjuqomg


https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1549153980604899328

ash (altashtree):
@nobuhojimichaan @smallkewlhuman lmao 😂
yes totally agree with that, a common perspective is that ascension is transcendance of the physical. [maybe](maybe) that is one kind, but i understand higher consciousness to mean higher levels of integration of consciousness with the body, embodying to “ascend”

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1549149859713880064

travis northcutt (tnorthcutt):
what phrases can you think of that paint curiosity in a *positive* light?

https://t.co/kufsrvlk3q

rpbmh 💔 out now (vincestaples):
you niggas can’t cook we can hear it in your raps

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1549131817319403526

visakan veerasamy (visakanv):
this might not always work for everyone, but probably worth sharing anyway:

whatever comes up when you fill in the blank of "why doesn't everyone just... _______" is often a clue about something you might be uncommonly well-suited to do

what fills in the blank for you?

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1549098685694623744

how do you settle?

#levelstothis https://t.co/ktdqaaplmj

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1549075407781171210

billy moreno (a_k_a_billy):
how do i find a therapist/counselor/guide who will challenge me and be interesting...like besides just legwork? what strategies

i have adhd and really struggle to connect to the process after the novelty of a new person wears off but i'd really like to do long work w/ someone

https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1549035466699051009

todone

talked to austin hambrick about jeff meyerson. we'd both like to see each other. we established that i'm ok with him aggressively reaching out and that he understands i'm interested even if i'm not aggressively reaching out

talked to amber about challenges navigating the pull between her own experience and her presence in noble's life. when she puts her experience first, she finds herself disliking being with noble and interacting with her roughly

walked to hank's. got a cold brew

texted michael rosenthal, jeff meyerson's younger brother

recording

sampling mos def's fear not of man

setting lyrics from:

i don't know if you know #sr

unbirthday suit #sr

queries/tweets in progress



music first draft, sampling mos def's fear not of man
currently july 19th, 2022 long
https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/07192022-unbirthday-suit-fear-no-mean-i-dont-know-if-you-know

game-testing with zane messina

emerald tavern

walked with zane through a demo game. suggested that he pay attention to dripping out info more slowly and organically throughout game play

talked about desperate dodge mechanic

how it loomed over every action once i was aware of it

that connected to finisher cards , which were unbounded in a different sense, being able to close games from long distances (though not quite as imbalanced as the golden snitch)

game seems sweet and i left wanting to play a competitive match
